# Pre-Install Cleanup Guide

Use this on machines that had older xtrm layouts and stale hook wiring.

## 1) Remove legacy Claude hook files

```bash
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/agent_context.py
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/branch-state.mjs
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/serena-workflow-reminder.py
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/main-guard.mjs ~/.claude/hooks/main-guard-post-push.mjs
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/statusline-starship.sh
```

## 2) Clear stale hook wiring from Claude settings (optional hard reset)

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, shutil
p = os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/settings.json')
if os.path.exists(p):
    shutil.copy(p, p + '.bak')
    d = json.load(open(p))
    d.pop('hooks', None)
    json.dump(d, open(p, 'w'), indent=2)
    print('removed hooks block from settings.json')
else:
    print('settings.json not found')
PY
```

## 3) Remove legacy Pi extension single-file layout

```bash
rm -f ~/.pi/agent/extensions/beads.ts
rm -f ~/.pi/agent/extensions/session-flow.ts
rm -f ~/.pi/agent/extensions/quality-gates.ts
rm -f ~/.pi/agent/extensions/service-skills.ts
```

## 4) Remove current extension directories to force clean re-copy (optional)

```bash
rm -rf ~/.pi/agent/extensions/beads
rm -rf ~/.pi/agent/extensions/session-flow
rm -rf ~/.pi/agent/extensions/quality-gates
rm -rf ~/.pi/agent/extensions/service-skills
```

## 5) Reinstall

```bash
xtrm install --yes
xtrm pi install
```

## Verify

```bash
node scripts/compile-policies.mjs --check
claude plugin list | grep xtrm-tools
```
